description: HR and ITSM routing checkpoint: IT Security Best Practices

arguments.title: IT Security Best Practices
arguments.body: Refresh the workflow guidance for HR portal account access and align the owner handoff to IT and customer support.

body.content: Knowledge alignment update: use the refreshed guidance for INC_049, HRC0000767, and CS-0000048.

arguments.worknotes: Aligned with HR knowledge 5 during routing cleanup.
Aligned with incident INC_049 and refreshed knowledge guidance.

arguments.short_description: Track aligned routing for HR portal account access
arguments.worknotes: Capture final confirmations after the knowledge alignment is published.

sub_task_list.user_prompt:
Complete the HR and ITSM routing unification for incident INC_049, HR case HRC0000767 with HR case ID 57, and customer case CS-0000048 with case ID 48. First, update HR knowledge article 5, titled IT Security Best Practices, by publishing it with internal visibility under owner 39, and refresh the workflow guidance for HR portal account access so the owner handoff aligns to IT and customer support. Then send a high-importance Teams message to team team_techcorp_001 in channel 2da4cc29dd784156a8903cc978016bd6 saying: Knowledge alignment update: use the refreshed guidance for INC_049, HRC0000767, and CS-0000048.

Next, ask the IT service desk L1 engineer to align incident INC_049 to the new guidance by moving it to in progress, assigning it to USER_022 in assignment group GROUP_002, and adding the work note: Aligned with HR knowledge 5 during routing cleanup.

After that, ask the HR service specialist to update HR case 57, number HRC0000767, to work in progress, assign it to Helen Zhou, and add the work note: Aligned with incident INC_049 and refreshed knowledge guidance. Also have them create an HR case task under parent case 57 with ready status, the short description Track aligned routing for HR portal account access, assigned to Helen Zhou, using the checklist task type, and with the work note: Capture final confirmations after the knowledge alignment is published.

Finally, ask the customer support specialist to update customer case 48 so it is in progress, set its priority to high, assign it to 795, and mark it for escalation with the escalation reason customer_request.
